    private global::Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.RenderFragment RenderTemplateField(TimelineProjection row, string columnPropertyName)
    {
        if (row is null || string.IsNullOrEmpty(columnPropertyName))
        {
            return static _ => { };
        }

        switch (columnPropertyName)
        {
            case "Id":
                return HasProjectionSlot("Id")
                    ? RenderSlotField(row,
                        fieldName: "Id",
                        displayName: "Id",
                        format: (string?)null,
                        order: (int?)null,
                        isFieldReadOnly: false,
                        description: (string?)null,
                        value: row.Id,
                        renderDefault: __ctx => RenderTemplateDefaultField(__ctx.Parent, "Id"))
                    : RenderTemplateDefaultField(row, "Id");
            case "Actor":
                return HasProjectionSlot("Actor")
                    ? RenderSlotField(row,
                        fieldName: "Actor",
                        displayName: "Actor",
                        format: (string?)null,
                        order: (int?)null,
                        isFieldReadOnly: false,
                        description: (string?)null,
                        value: row.Actor,
                        renderDefault: __ctx => RenderTemplateDefaultField(__ctx.Parent, "Actor"))
                    : RenderTemplateDefaultField(row, "Actor");
            case "Description":
                return HasProjectionSlot("Description")
                    ? RenderSlotField(row,
                        fieldName: "Description",
                        displayName: "Description",
                        format: (string?)null,
                        order: (int?)null,
                        isFieldReadOnly: false,
                        description: (string?)null,
                        value: row.Description,
                        renderDefault: __ctx => RenderTemplateDefaultField(__ctx.Parent, "Description"))
                    : RenderTemplateDefaultField(row, "Description");
            case "OccurredAt":
                return HasProjectionSlot("OccurredAt")
                    ? RenderSlotField(row,
                        fieldName: "OccurredAt",
                        displayName: "Occurred At",
                        format: "d",
                        order: (int?)null,
                        isFieldReadOnly: false,
                        description: (string?)null,
                        value: row.OccurredAt,
                        renderDefault: __ctx => RenderTemplateDefaultField(__ctx.Parent, "OccurredAt"))
                    : RenderTemplateDefaultField(row, "OccurredAt");
            case "Severity":
                return HasProjectionSlot("Severity")
                    ? RenderSlotField(row,
                        fieldName: "Severity",
                        displayName: "Severity",
                        format: "Humanize:30",
                        order: (int?)null,
                        isFieldReadOnly: false,
                        description: (string?)null,
                        value: row.Severity,
                        renderDefault: __ctx => RenderTemplateDefaultField(__ctx.Parent, "Severity"))
                    : RenderTemplateDefaultField(row, "Severity");
            default:
                return static _ => { };
        }
    }

    private global::Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.RenderFragment RenderTemplateDefaultField(TimelineProjection row, string columnPropertyName)
    {
        if (row is null || string.IsNullOrEmpty(columnPropertyName))
        {
            return static _ => { };
        }

        switch (columnPropertyName)
        {
            case "Id":
                return builder =>
                {
                    if (row is null) { return; }
                    int fieldSeq = 0;
                    builder.AddContent(fieldSeq++, row.Id.ToString());
                };
            case "Actor":
                return builder =>
                {
                    if (row is null) { return; }
                    int fieldSeq = 0;
                    builder.AddContent(fieldSeq++, row.Actor.ToString());
                };
            case "Description":
                return builder =>
                {
                    if (row is null) { return; }
                    int fieldSeq = 0;
                    builder.AddContent(fieldSeq++, row.Description.ToString());
                };
            case "OccurredAt":
                return builder =>
                {
                    if (row is null) { return; }
                    int fieldSeq = 0;
                    builder.AddContent(fieldSeq++, row.OccurredAt.ToString("d", CultureInfo.CurrentCulture));
                };
            case "Severity":
                return builder =>
                {
                    if (row is null) { return; }
                    int fieldSeq = 0;
                    var _memberName = row.Severity.ToString();
                    var _label = HumanizeEnumLabel(_memberName);
                    switch (_memberName)
                    {
                        case "Info":
                            builder.OpenComponent<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Badges.FcStatusBadge>(fieldSeq++);
                            builder.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "Slot", global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.BadgeSlot.Neutral);
                            builder.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "Label", _label);
                            builder.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "ColumnHeader", "Severity");
                            builder.CloseComponent();
                            break;
                        case "Warning":
                            builder.OpenComponent<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Badges.FcStatusBadge>(fieldSeq++);
                            builder.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "Slot", global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.BadgeSlot.Warning);
                            builder.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "Label", _label);
                            builder.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "ColumnHeader", "Severity");
                            builder.CloseComponent();
                            break;
                        case "Critical":
                            builder.OpenComponent<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Badges.FcStatusBadge>(fieldSeq++);
                            builder.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "Slot", global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.BadgeSlot.Danger);
                            builder.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "Label", _label);
                            builder.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "ColumnHeader", "Severity");
                            builder.CloseComponent();
                            break;
                        default:
                            builder.AddContent(fieldSeq++, FcShellLocalizer["StatusBadgeUnknownStateFallback"].Value);
                            break;
                    }
                };
            default:
                return static _ => { };
        }
    }

    private global::Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.RenderFragment RenderTemplateRow(TimelineProjection row)
    {
        if (row is null)
        {
            return static _ => { };
        }

        return builder =>
        {
            int rowSeq = 0;
            builder.OpenElement(rowSeq++, "div");
            builder.AddAttribute(rowSeq++, "class", "fc-template-row");
            {
            builder.OpenElement(rowSeq++, "span");
            builder.AddAttribute(rowSeq++, "class", "fc-template-field");
            builder.AddAttribute(rowSeq++, "data-fc-field", "Id");
            RenderTemplateField(row, "Id")(builder);
            builder.CloseElement();
            }
            {
            builder.OpenElement(rowSeq++, "span");
            builder.AddAttribute(rowSeq++, "class", "fc-template-field");
            builder.AddAttribute(rowSeq++, "data-fc-field", "Actor");
            RenderTemplateField(row, "Actor")(builder);
            builder.CloseElement();
            }
            {
            builder.OpenElement(rowSeq++, "span");
            builder.AddAttribute(rowSeq++, "class", "fc-template-field");
            builder.AddAttribute(rowSeq++, "data-fc-field", "Description");
            RenderTemplateField(row, "Description")(builder);
            builder.CloseElement();
            }
            {
            builder.OpenElement(rowSeq++, "span");
            builder.AddAttribute(rowSeq++, "class", "fc-template-field");
            builder.AddAttribute(rowSeq++, "data-fc-field", "OccurredAt");
            RenderTemplateField(row, "OccurredAt")(builder);
            builder.CloseElement();
            }
            {
            builder.OpenElement(rowSeq++, "span");
            builder.AddAttribute(rowSeq++, "class", "fc-template-field");
            builder.AddAttribute(rowSeq++, "data-fc-field", "Severity");
            RenderTemplateField(row, "Severity")(builder);
            builder.CloseElement();
            }
            builder.CloseElement();
        };
    }

    private bool HasProjectionSlot(string fieldName)
        => ProjectionSlotRegistry.Resolve(typeof(TimelineProjection), (Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole?)Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole.Timeline, fieldName) is not null;

    private global::Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.RenderFragment RenderSlotField<TField>(
        TimelineProjection row,
        string fieldName,
        string displayName,
        string? format,
        int? order,
        bool isFieldReadOnly,
        string? description,
        TField? value,
        global::Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.RenderFragment<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.FieldSlotContext<TimelineProjection, TField>> renderDefault)
    {
        return builder =>
        {
            var __renderContext = RenderContext ?? new global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.RenderContext(
                TenantId: string.Empty,
                UserId: string.Empty,
                Mode: global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.FcRenderMode.Server,
                DensityLevel: global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.DensityLevel.Comfortable,
                IsReadOnly: false);
            var __field = new global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.FieldDescriptor(
                Name: fieldName,
                TypeName: typeof(TField).FullName ?? typeof(TField).Name,
                IsNullable: System.Nullable.GetUnderlyingType(typeof(TField)) is not null || !typeof(TField).IsValueType,
                DisplayName: displayName,
                Format: format,
                Order: order,
                IsReadOnly: isFieldReadOnly,
                Hints: null,
                Description: description);
            builder.OpenComponent<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Rendering.FcFieldSlotHost<TimelineProjection, TField>>(0);
            builder.AddAttribute(1, "Parent", row);
            builder.AddAttribute(2, "Value", value);
            builder.AddAttribute(3, "Field", __field);
            builder.AddAttribute(4, "RenderContext", __renderContext);
            builder.AddAttribute(5, "ProjectionRole", (Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole?)Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole.Timeline);
            builder.AddAttribute(6, "RenderDefault", renderDefault);
            builder.CloseComponent();
        };
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    protected override void OnInitialized()
    {
        TimelineProjectionState.StateChanged += OnStateChanged;
    }

    private void OnStateChanged(object? sender, EventArgs e)
        => InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);

    /// <inheritdoc />
    public void Dispose()
    {
        TimelineProjectionState.StateChanged -= OnStateChanged;
    }

    private static string Truncate(string value, int maxLength)
        => value.Length <= maxLength ? value : value.Substring(0, maxLength - 1) + "\u2026";

    private static string HumanizeEnumLabel(string value)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(value))
        {
            return value;
        }

        var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder(value.Length + 10);

        for (int i = 0; i < value.Length; i++)
        {
            char c = value[i];

            if (i == 0)
            {
                sb.Append(char.ToUpperInvariant(c));
                continue;
            }

            bool isUpper = c >= 'A' && c <= 'Z';
            bool prevIsUpper = value[i - 1] >= 'A' && value[i - 1] <= 'Z';
            bool prevIsLower = value[i - 1] >= 'a' && value[i - 1] <= 'z';
            bool prevIsDigit = value[i - 1] >= '0' && value[i - 1] <= '9';

            if (isUpper && prevIsLower)
            {
                sb.Append(' ');
                sb.Append(c);
            }
            else if (isUpper && prevIsUpper && i + 1 < value.Length)
            {
                char next = value[i + 1];
                bool nextIsLower = next >= 'a' && next <= 'z';
                if (nextIsLower && CountConsecutiveUppersBefore(value, i) + 1 >= 3)
                {
                    sb.Append(' ');
                }

                sb.Append(c);
            }
            else if (isUpper && prevIsDigit)
            {
                sb.Append(' ');
                sb.Append(c);
            }
            else
            {
                sb.Append(c);
            }
        }

        return sb.ToString();
    }

    private static int CountConsecutiveUppersBefore(string value, int index)
    {
        int count = 0;
        for (int i = index - 1; i >= 0; i--)
        {
            if (value[i] >= 'A' && value[i] <= 'Z')
            {
                count++;
            }
            else
            {
                break;
            }
        }

        return count;
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    protected override void BuildRenderTree(RenderTreeBuilder builder)
    {
        var state = TimelineProjectionState.Value;
        int seq = 0;

        builder.OpenComponent<Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Rendering.FcProjectionSubtitle>(seq++);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ProjectionType", typeof(TimelineProjection));
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Role", (Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole?)Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole.Timeline);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "WhenState", (string?)null);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "FallbackCount", state.Items?.Count ?? 0);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "DistinctStatusCount", (int?)null);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "EntityLabel", "Timeline");
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "EntityPluralLabel", "timelines");
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "IsLoading", state.IsLoading);
        builder.CloseComponent();

        if (state.IsLoading)
        {
            builder.OpenComponent<Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Rendering.FcProjectionLoadingSkeleton>(seq++);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ColumnCount", 5);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "RowCount", 5);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Layout", Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Rendering.SkeletonLayout.Timeline);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "EntityLabel", "timelines");
            builder.CloseComponent();
            return;
        }

        if (state.Items is null || state.Items.Count == 0)
        {
            builder.OpenComponent<Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Rendering.FcProjectionEmptyPlaceholder>(seq++);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ProjectionType", typeof(TimelineProjection));
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Role", (Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole?)Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole.Timeline);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "EntityPluralOverride", "timelines");
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "CtaCommandName", (string?)null);
            builder.CloseComponent();
            return;
        }

        seq = 100;
        global::Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.RenderFragment defaultBody = (global::Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Rendering.RenderTreeBuilder __bb) =>
        {
            var builder = __bb;
            int seq = 100;
        var orderedItems = state.Items.OrderByDescending(x => x.OccurredAt).ToList();

        builder.OpenComponent<FluentStack>(seq++);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Orientation", Orientation.Vertical);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder b) =>
        {
            int rowSeq = 700;
            foreach (var item in orderedItems)
            {
                b.OpenElement(rowSeq++, "div");
                b.AddAttribute(rowSeq++, "class", "fc-timeline-row");
                if (HasProjectionSlot("OccurredAt"))
                {
                    RenderSlotField(item,
                        fieldName: "OccurredAt",
                        displayName: "Occurred At",
                        format: "d",
                        order: (int?)null,
                        isFieldReadOnly: false,
                        description: (string?)null,
                        value: item.OccurredAt,
                        renderDefault: __ctx => RenderTemplateDefaultField(__ctx.Parent, "OccurredAt"))(b);
                }
                else
                {
                    RenderTemplateDefaultField(item, "OccurredAt")(b);
                }
                b.AddMarkupContent(rowSeq++, " ");
                if (HasProjectionSlot("Description"))
                {
                    RenderSlotField(item,
                        fieldName: "Description",
                        displayName: "Description",
                        format: (string?)null,
                        order: (int?)null,
                        isFieldReadOnly: false,
                        description: (string?)null,
                        value: item.Description,
                        renderDefault: __ctx => RenderTemplateDefaultField(__ctx.Parent, "Description"))(b);
                }
                else
                {
                    RenderTemplateDefaultField(item, "Description")(b);
                }
                b.AddMarkupContent(rowSeq++, " ");
                if (HasProjectionSlot("Severity"))
                {
                    RenderSlotField(item,
                        fieldName: "Severity",
                        displayName: "Severity",
                        format: "Humanize:30",
                        order: (int?)null,
                        isFieldReadOnly: false,
                        description: (string?)null,
                        value: item.Severity,
                        renderDefault: __ctx => RenderTemplateDefaultField(__ctx.Parent, "Severity"))(b);
                }
                else
                {
                    RenderTemplateDefaultField(item, "Severity")(b);
                }
                b.CloseElement();
            }
        }));
        builder.CloseComponent();
        };

        var __viewOverrideDescriptor = ProjectionViewOverrideRegistry.Resolve(typeof(TimelineProjection), (Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole?)Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole.Timeline);
        if (__viewOverrideDescriptor is not null)
        {
            var __viewOverrideContext = new global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.ProjectionViewContext<TimelineProjection>(
                projectionType: typeof(TimelineProjection),
                boundedContext: "Audit",
                role: (Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole?)Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole.Timeline,
                items: state.Items ?? (System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList<TimelineProjection>)System.Array.Empty<TimelineProjection>(),
                renderContext: RenderContext,
                columns: _templateColumnsDescriptor,
                sections: _templateSectionsDescriptor,
                lifecycleState: state.IsLoading ? "Loading" : (state.Items?.Count ?? 0) == 0 ? "Empty" : "Loaded",
                entityLabel: "Timeline",
                entityPluralLabel: "timelines",
                defaultBody: defaultBody,
                sectionRenderer: sectionName => string.Equals(sectionName, "Body", System.StringComparison.Ordinal) ? defaultBody : static _ => { },
                rowRenderer: RenderTemplateRow,
                fieldRenderer: RenderTemplateField);

            builder.OpenComponent<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Rendering.FcProjectionViewOverrideHost<TimelineProjection>>(seq++);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Descriptor", __viewOverrideDescriptor);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Context", __viewOverrideContext);
            builder.CloseComponent();
        }
        else
        {
        var __templateDescriptor = ProjectionTemplateRegistry.Resolve(typeof(TimelineProjection), (Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole?)Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole.Timeline);
        if (__templateDescriptor is not null)
        {
            var __templateContext = new global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.ProjectionTemplateContext<TimelineProjection>(
                projectionType: typeof(TimelineProjection),
                boundedContext: "Audit",
                role: (Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole?)Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole.Timeline,
                renderContext: RenderContext,
                items: state.Items ?? (System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList<TimelineProjection>)System.Array.Empty<TimelineProjection>(),
                columns: _templateColumnsDescriptor,
                sections: _templateSectionsDescriptor,
                defaultBody: defaultBody,
                sectionRenderer: sectionName => string.Equals(sectionName, "Body", System.StringComparison.Ordinal) ? defaultBody : static _ => { },
                rowRenderer: RenderTemplateRow,
                fieldRenderer: RenderTemplateField);

            builder.OpenComponent(seq++, __templateDescriptor.TemplateType);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Context", __templateContext);
            builder.CloseComponent();
        }
        else
        {
            defaultBody(builder);
        }
        }
    }
